characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, brown complexion. She has long, dark, wavy hair, wears glasses, and has a nose ring.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a light blue, button-up top with subtle embroidery throughout the video.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged male, average build, light complexion. He has short brown hair.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a checkered button-down shirt.

characters.appearance: White humanoid robot avatar. It has a smooth, metallic face with blue eyes and a glowing blue circular core on its chest.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मेरे colleagues को लगता है कि मेरी English weak है। [My colleagues think my English is weak.]
Character A says: वो अक्सर मेरे accent का मज़ाक उड़ाते थे। [They used to often make fun of my accent.]
Character A says: चलिए, आज उनका reaction देखते हैं। [Let's see their reaction today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable workplace insecurity (being mocked for accent).
- Establishes the protagonist's secret effort to improve.
- Sets up a satisfying payoff for the next scene.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: मेरे colleagues को लगता है कि मेरी English weak है। वो अक्सर मेरे accent का मज़ाक उड़ाते थे। चलिए, आज उनका reaction देखते हैं। Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: I'd like to propose a different approach to this project. [I'd like to propose a different approach to this project.]
Character B says: What did you say? [What did you say?]
Character A says: A different approach. [A different approach.]
Character B says: Wow, तुम्हारी English में इतना confidence कैसे? [Wow, how is there so much confidence in your English?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the real-world payoff of using the app.
- Shows the protagonist speaking confidently in a professional setting.
- Highlights the colleague's positive surprise, validating her progress.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: I'd like to propose a different approach to this project. What did you say? A different approach. Wow, तुम्हारी English में इतना confidence कैसे? Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Lunch के बाद मैं phone पर Instagram scroll नहीं कर रही थी। [After lunch, I wasn't scrolling Instagram on my phone.]
Character A says: मैं Supernova app पर अपनी English practice कर रही थी। [I was practicing my English on the Supernova app.]
Character A says: ये बिल्कुल एक personal AI tutor की तरह है। [It's exactly like a personal AI tutor.]
Character A says: Look, let me show you. [Look, let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reveals the solution (Supernova app) to the audience.
- Positions the app as a productive alternative to mindless scrolling.
- Introduces the core concept of a personal AI tutor.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Lunch के बाद मैं phone पर Instagram scroll नहीं कर रही थी। मैं Supernova app पर अपनी English practice कर रही थी। ये बिल्कुल एक personal AI tutor की तरह है। Look, let me show you. Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: क्या आप भी बिना डरे English बोलना चाहते हैं? [Do you also want to speak English without fear?]
Character C says: Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करें। [Practice daily with Supernova.]
Character C says: ये app बोलते वक़्त आपकी गलतियां सुधारता है, बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह। [This app corrects your mistakes while you speak, just like a friend.]
Character C says: Let's try it together. [Let's try it together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the AI tutor character directly to the viewer.
- Replaces competitor's unrealistic '1 week' hype with a practical, encouraging promise of daily practice.
- Explains the real-time correction feature in a friendly, non-intimidating way.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: क्या आप भी बिना डरे English बोलना चाहते हैं? Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करें। ये app बोलते वक़्त आपकी गलतियां सुधारता है, बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह। Let's try it together. Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: A little bit. [A little bit.]
Character C says: Where do you live? [Where do you live?]
Character A says: I am Delhi. [I am Delhi.]
Character C says: Almost. You should say, I live in Delhi. [Almost. You should say, I live in Delhi.]
Character A says: मैं हमेशा इसमें confuse हो जाती हूँ। [I always get confused in this.]
Character C says: कोई बात नहीं! मैं आपकी grammar और pronunciation सुधारने में मदद करूँगा। [No problem! I will help improve your grammar and pronunciation.]
Character A says: पर क्या ये बहुत महंगा है? [But is it very expensive?]
Character C says: बिल्कुल नहीं। Supernova बहुत affordable है। [Not at all. Supernova is very affordable.]
Character C says: आप real-world situations जैसे interview या office के लिए practice कर सकते हैं। [You can practice for real-world situations like interviews or office.]
Character A says: Like, a real tutor? [Like, a real tutor?]
Character C says: Yes. बिना किसी झिझक के, confidence के साथ बोलना सीखें। [Yes. Learn to speak with confidence, without any hesitation.]
Character A says: Okay. मैं Supernova अभी download करती हूँ। [Okay. I am downloading Supernova right now.]
Character C says: Great decision. Let's speak English together. [Great decision. Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows a relatable, interactive product demonstration.
- Addresses common grammar mistakes (I am vs I live in) in an Indian context (Delhi).
- Pivots the pricing objection from 'free' to 'affordable' while highlighting real-world situational practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Do you speak English? A little bit. Where do you live? I am Delhi. Almost. You should say, I live in Delhi. मैं हमेशा इसमें confuse हो जाती हूँ। कोई बात नहीं! मैं आपकी grammar और pronunciation सुधारने में मदद करूँगा। पर क्या ये बहुत महंगा है? बिल्कुल नहीं। Supernova बहुत affordable है। आप real-world situations जैसे interview या office के लिए practice कर सकते हैं। Like, a real tutor? Yes. बिना किसी झिझक के, confidence के साथ बोलना सीखें। Okay. मैं Supernova अभी download करती हूँ। Great decision. Let's speak English together. Supernova

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: आज ही Supernova download करें और confidence से English बोलें। [Download Supernova today and speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, direct call to action.
- Reinforces the core brand promise of speaking English with confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: DOWNLOAD NOW! START PRACTICING. Supernova. Download on the App Store. GET IT ON Google Play
